content:
A 30-Day Journey with Siddhartha: Aligning the Path with Daily Life
Welcome to your 30-day guided journal through Hermann Hesse's Siddhartha. This template is designed to merge the profound wisdom of Siddhartha's journey with your own daily life, creating a powerful habit of reflection and intention. Use the story's progression to illuminate your own path, connect your actions to your deepest aspirations, and build momentum toward a life of purpose.
How to Use This Journal:
  1. Fill Out Your Grand Vision: Before you begin, take time to fill out the long-term goal sections. This is your North Star.
  2. Set Weekly Goals: At the start of each week, define clear goals for the next seven days.
  3. Morning Routine (5-10 Minutes): Read the suggested passage for the day. Set an intention based on its theme.
  4. Night Routine (5-10 Minutes): Read the evening passage and reflect on how its themes appeared in your own life.
The Grand Vision: Your North Star
Answer these prompts before you begin Day 1. Revisit them at the start of each week to stay aligned.
